notes: agent_input_footer/mod.rs:126 + block/view_impl/common.rs:905 — FAST_FORWARD_LOCKED_TOOLTIP, a user-visible tooltip string (props.is_locked branch). Translated; 'Agent' kept English per glossary, 'fast forward' rendered as 快进. appearance_page.rs toggle pairs (lines 280/454/424/289/445/271/262) are ToggleSettingActionPair::new first arg `description_suffix` — confirmed user-visible (mod.rs:744 renders 'Enable {suffix}'/'Disable {suffix}' in command palette). Translated per glossary: agent→Agent, notebook→笔记本, tab→标签页, blur→模糊, padding→内边距. appearance_page.rs:2967 is fn search_terms() return value → bilingual append (English keywords kept verbatim, Chinese appended, no punctuation). destructive_mcp_confirmation_dialog.rs:74 'Remove from team' is a destructive button label → translated. iap.rs:8 'Bearer {token}' is format! for the Proxy-Authorization HTTP header value (RFC auth scheme), wire/protocol literal, not UI → protocol_key. session.rs:203/206 are .expect('Invalid token URL'/'Invalid device URL') → panic_message. session.rs:189 'Unable to obtain access token' is .context() on an anyhow error wrapped into UserAuthenticationError::Unexpected, which renders into the dev-facing error chain ('{0:#}') and log::info! sinks, not a translated UI surface → telemetry_payload.
